archetype_name: Swiss & High-Contrast (adapted for Tech SaaS with Jewel/Neon Accents)

fonts.notes: Space Grotesk MUST be used for large display headings on the Landing Page. For Dashboards, Tests, Results, and Apps, use DM Sans for headings to ensure readability. Use JetBrains Mono for code editors and test results.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Bento Grids for marketing, Dense Control Room grid for dashboards. Split pane layout for Test Editor.
spacing_and_layout.landing_page: Bento Grid (md:grid-cols-12, gap-8). Use p-12 and p-16 for massive visual breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard: Control Room Grid (md:grid-cols-3 or md:grid-cols-4, gap-6). Use p-4 to p-6 inside cards.
spacing_and_layout.test_editor: Split-pane layout. Left: Visual Builder (min-w-[300px]), Right: Code View. Use h-[calc(100vh-theme(spacing.16))] for full screen editor.

components.cards: Surface #12141D, 1px solid border-white/10, rounded-xl, shadow-2xl. Hover states should slightly lighten the border (border-white/20) and elevate the element (-translate-y-1).

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-600 text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(147,51,234,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-[#0F1117] border border-white/10 text-white placeholder-zinc-500 rounded-md focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500

motion.page_transitions: Framer Motion: initial opacity-0 y-4, animate opacity-100 y-0, duration 0.4s
motion.bento_items: Staggered fade-up entrances using Framer Motion.

hero_background.description: Abstract digital landscape with neon lights resembling a cyber grid against a dark background.
hero_background.usage: Landing page hero section background (must be overlayed with heavy bg-black/80 to ensure text legibility) or abstract feature grid backgrounds.

features_abstract.description: Dynamic abstract scene with neon lights and geometric patterns
features_abstract.usage: Use selectively behind bento boxes or feature showcases (add strong overlay).

testimonial_avatar.usage: Testimonial or user profile avatar placeholder.

icons_and_logos.library: lucide-react for UI icons. react-icons for brand logos.
icons_and_logos.instructions: DO NOT USE image placeholders for Integrations. MUST use 'react-icons/si' (e.g., SiGithub, SiSlack, SiJenkins, SiJira) or 'react-icons/fa'. Run 'yarn add react-icons' to install.

testing.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g. data-testid='run-test-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark High-Contrast Tech theme (deep obsidian bases).

Use the blue/purple gradient (from-blue-500 to-purple-600) exclusively as a high-impact accent for Primary CTAs, active states, glowing borders, or gradient text. Do NOT use it as a massive flat background.
Use Space Grotesk exclusively for large Landing Page headings. Use DM Sans for the Dashboard, Editor, and Settings to ensure clarity.
Install and use 'react-icons' for the Integrations page logos (GitHub, Slack, Jenkins, Jira). Never use placeholder URLs.
Implement the Test Editor using a split pane layout: Visual builder with nested steps on the left, Playwright code view on the right.
Ensure the code editor uses JetBrains Mono font (if possible) or a generic monospace font with high contrast syntax highlighting.
All cards and panels must have a 1px border (border-white/10) to separate them from the dark background. Do not rely solely on shadows in dark mode.
Use 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#12141D]/70 border-b border-white/10' for the main navigation header so it floats above the content.
Ensure all interactive elements have explicit hover and focus states defined with clear contrast changes.
CRITICAL: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, inputs, and major UI components to enable automated testing.
